prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年物理类（理科组）最低位次分别为约2383名、2223名、3458名、1903名、2036名，整体波动较大，2023年出现明显后移（3458名），2024年大幅回升 至1903名，2025年小幅回落至2036名，近两年基准位次在1900-2040区间；该校在青海省物理类招生计划2021年20人、2022年16人、2023年21人、2024年16人、2 025年17人，2026年计划增至23人，较2025年扩招约35.3%，扩招幅度显著，对位次有下拉作用（位次数字增大，竞争相对缓和）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 兰州大学为985工 程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜排名第40位（2026年），近年排名稳定在38-40名区间，属于中上游985院校，综合实力强劲；2026年高考周 期声誉评价为"偏正面"，主要源于校园人文关怀事件（硕士毕业生致谢保卫部默许拾荒老人进校）等正面舆情；抖音热度排名第53位，评价"较热"，综合热度约59万，关注度中等 偏上；近年无投档断档记录，报考心理稳定；拥有生态学A+、草学A+、化学A-、地理学A-、生物学A-等5个A类学科，其中草学、生态学为全国顶尖水平，与该校 在青海招生的草业科学（基地班）、生态学等专业直接对应。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程、临床医学等工科/医学类专业社会热度持续偏高，兰 州大学在青海物理类投放的计算机类、电子信息类、临床医学等均为热门专业，对高分考生吸引力较强；青海省2026年普通高考考生总数约48000人，较2025年（约47669人）略有 增加，竞争小幅加剧；兰州大学位于甘肃省兰州市，与青海省地理相邻，交通便利，对青海考生具有天然的地缘亲近优势；该校 在青海省招生人数较少（2025年约15人），占比极低，属于小规模招生，位次易受个别高分考生报考行为影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次2036名、2026年大幅扩招约 35.3%对位次的下拉作用（位次数字增大），以及学校声誉偏正面、热门专业吸引力强、考生总数小幅增加等竞争加剧因素，经，预测2026年物理类最 低录取位次约2437名，区间2071-2803名。扩招是位次后移的主要驱动因素，而声誉与专业热度则部分抵消了扩招的宽松效应。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（2071-2803名）内，建议以二档专业为主力填报区间，一档专业（计算机类、电子信息类、临床医学）可作为冲刺目标，三档专业（地质学、生态学、地理科学 类）作为保底选择。位次明显优于区间下限（如2000名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (Science Group) were approximately 2383, 2223, 3458, 1903, and 2036 respectively, showing significant fluctuations overall, with a notable drop in 2023 (3458), a sharp rebound to 1903 in 2024, and a slight decline to 2036 in 2025, with the baseline ranking in the 1900-2040 range in recent two years; the enrollment plan for this university in Qinghai Province Physics Category was 20 in 2021, 16 in 2022, 21 in 2023, 16 in 2024, and 17 in 2025, and the plan for 2026 increases to 23, an expansion of about 35.3% compared to 2025, which is significant and has a downward effect on rankings (ranking number increases, competition relatively eases).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Lanzhou University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, ranking 40th on the Soft Science China University Main Ranking (2026), with a stable ranking in the 38-40 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 985 universities with strong comprehensive strength; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is 'slightly positive', mainly due to positive campus humanistic care incidents (a master's graduate's thank-you letter to the security department for allowing a waste-picking elderly person to enter the campus) and other positive public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 53rd, with an evaluation of 'relatively hot', comprehensive popularity about 590,000, with moderate to high attention; no record of admission cutoff drops in recent years, stable application psychology; it has 5 A-level disciplines including Ecology A+, Grassland Science A+, Chemistry A-, Geography A-, and Biology A-, among which Grassland Science and Ecology are top national levels, directly corresponding to the Grassland Science (Base Class) and Ecology majors offered by this university in Qinghai.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for engineering/medical majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and Clinical Medicine remains high; Lanzhou University offers popular majors like Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Clinical Medicine in Qinghai Physics Category, which strongly attract high-scoring candidates; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Qinghai Province regular college entrance examination is about 48,000, a slight increase from 2025 (about 47,669), leading to a small intensification of competition; Lanzhou University is located in Lanzhou City, Gansu Province, adjacent to Qinghai Province with convenient transportation, providing a natural geographical affinity advantage for Qinghai candidates; the university enrolls a small number of students in Qinghai Province (about 15 in 2025), with a very low proportion, making rankings easily affected by individual high-scoring candidates' application behavior.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2036, the downward effect on rankings (ranking number increases) from the significant expansion of about 35.3% in 2026, along with factors intensifying competition such as slightly positive university reputation, strong attraction of popular majors, and a small increase in total candidates, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 2437, with a range of 2071-2803. Expansion is the main driver for the ranking drop, while reputation and major popularity partially offset the easing effect of expansion.

- Clinical Medicine

- Physics (including Base Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Geology (Top-Notch Base)
- Ecology (New Enrollment in 2026)
- Geographical Sciences (New Enrollment in 2026)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range (2071-2803), it is recommended to use Tier 2 majors as the main filling range, Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Clinical Medicine) as sprint targets, and Tier 3 majors (Geology, Ecology, Geographical Sciences) as safety choices. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 2000), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (Liberal Arts Group) were approximately 604, 629, 1621, 617, and 691 respectively. In 2023, an anomaly occurred, shifting the ranking to 1621, but it quickly recovered to 617 in 2024 and slightly rose to 691 in 2025. The baseline ranking in recent two years is in the 617-691 range, showing an overall forward trend. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Qinghai Province was 2 in 2021, 8 in 2022, 9 in 2023, 8 in 2024, and 6 in 2025. The 2026 plan increases to 7, an expansion of about 16.7% compared to 2025, which has a slight downward pull on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Lanzhou University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. It ranks 40th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, with comprehensive strength leading in the Northwest region. Its reputation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is rated as 'somewhat positive', with campus humanistic care events enhancing the university's image. Its Douyin popularity ranks 53rd, considered 'relatively hot'. There are no records of admission cut-off drops, indicating stable application psychology. Lanzhou University's advantageous liberal arts disciplines include Ethnology (A+ in Minzu University of China evaluation, B+ at Lanzhou University), Marxist Theory (B+), etc., which are somewhat related to the enrollment majors of Ethnology and Marxist Theory.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Chinese Language and Literature, Marxist Theory, and Business Administration are experiencing divided and wait-and-see social popularity, overall stable. In 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Qinghai Province is approximately 17,328 (estimated by historical proportion), a slight increase from 17,212 in 2025. Lanzhou University is geographically adjacent to Qinghai Province, offering geographical appeal to Qinghai liberal arts examinees. The university's enrollment of liberal arts students in Qinghai is extremely small (6-9 people), making rankings susceptible to individual applicant behavior and highly volatile.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 691, the downward pull of a 16.7% enrollment expansion in 2026, and competitive factors such as a somewhat positive reputation and a slight increase in examinees, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will be approximately 745, with a range of 545-945. The enrollment expansion is the main factor for the ranking shift backward, but the extremely small number of enrollments leads to high uncertainty.
